market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
articles.description: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
articles.description: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

articles.title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
articles.description: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

articles.title: Elon Musk says X will send DMs when posts you’ve engaged with are corrected
articles.description: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

articles.title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
articles.description: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

articles.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
articles.description: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

articles.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
articles.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time&

articles.title: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
articles.description: The Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company and Cantor Equity Partners I announced that they were looking into amending the terms of a 2025 merger deal that “better reflected market conditions.”

articles.title: Stablecoin-settled TradFi perpetual trading tops $1.1T: Binance Research
articles.description: A new Binance Research report said stablecoins are fast becoming a preferred settlement layer for tokenized TradFi markets while gaining traction in payments and savings.

articles.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
articles.description: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

articles.title: Bank of England governor denies Farage lobbying swayed CBDC policy: Report
articles.description: Andrew Bailey reportedly said Bank of England policy remained independent after a meeting with Nigel Farage that included discussions on cryptocurrency.

articles.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
articles.description: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

articles.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raises $1.2B to invest in ‘technical frontier’ startups
articles.description: For Paradigm, the technical frontier will stretch beyond its cryptocurrency investment roots. This fund is expected to expand its investment focus to include robotics and AI.

articles.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
articles.description: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

articles.title: Polymarket bets on U.S. marketing blitz to win back trust after 4-year ban: Report
articles.description: The prediction market's head of U.S. operations says the business is taking steps to legitimize itself after years of legal scrutiny.

articles.title: These AI startups are growing  revenue at faster and faster rates
articles.description: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

articles.title: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
articles.description: Bitcoin price pressure took BTC toward the "crucial" $61,000 mark as oil prices soared on the collapse of the US-Iran ceasefire.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: With MSTR concerns assuaged, look to traditional signals around BTC
articles.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, FalconX’s Gaspar Martin writes that BTC is reaching a market bottom and is poised for a turnaround.

articles.title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets
articles.description: The firm's latest fund backs AI and robotics startups but leadership says it remains committed to crypto investing.
